description: A workstation-local, cross-harness, same-UID event bus: wait on or broadcast events from CI, pytest, Docker, and the filesystem over a local socket, and let agents coordinate on the same bus. Python library plus MCP server plus CLI.
rules: waitbus is local-only over a same-UID AF_UNIX socket with SO_PEERCRED: no network transport, no cloud, no inter-agent confidentiality (agent names are self-asserted addresses, not credentials).
Primary surfaces: the waitbus CLI (waitbus wait, waitbus mcp serve, waitbus doctor), the MCP server (waitbus mcp serve, stdio), and the Python library (emit, subscribe, wait_for, request, respond).
The MCP server exposes read tools plus tail_events (a bounded long-poll) and agent messaging (emit_agent_message, read_agent_messages).
Install tool-isolated: uv tool install waitbus, or uvx --from waitbus.
docs/ does not ship in the wheel or sdist; in installed contexts use the GitHub URLs, not repo-relative docs/ paths.
